subcodes.first_line: O ye who are ablaze with the fire of God's love! The tremors of tribulation and successive waves of trial have seized the regions [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها المشتعلون بنار محبه الله قد اخذت راجفه الامتحان و رادفه الافتتان اقالیم
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
